event.description: Crumbling stone pillars mark the remains of an ancient shrine. At its center, a weathered altar glows with faint blue runes. A shallow pool of crystal-clear water lies before it. The forest has reclaimed much of this place, but the magic remains.

choices.label: Read the runes
choices.successText: The runes reveal a healing incantation. Warmth flows through your body as ancient magic mends your wounds.
choices.failText: The runes twist in your vision. A surge of dark energy lashes out, burning your mind.

choices.label: Drink from the pool
choices.successText: The water is impossibly sweet. You feel renewed strength coursing through you.
choices.failText: The water tastes of ash. Your stomach churns painfully.
